{{Infobox character
| name = Mul’Tanak
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Spider Goddess of Blood and War, goddess}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tanakites]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Mul’Tanak is the [[Spider Goddess]] associated with warfare and blood. Her name, which translates to unending swords, utilizes a prefix specifically reserved for female deities. The Tanakite people believe their ability to conquer much of the continent was a divine gift from her, and much of the current conflict is being waged in her honor. She possesses a physical form characterized by multiple bladed limbs, including six arms on her back and crimson legs. Her arrival was marked by the tearing of the world's walls by sharpened blades.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Mul’Tanak is the [[Spider Goddess]] of Blood and War, a deity whose name combines the prefix for female gods with a term meaning swords unending. Represented by an idol of a black-bladed spider, she is known to favor blades and blood. The goddess descended in human form, appearing with crimson eyes, black-armored hands, and a black carapace. Her physical form also features scarlet-stained [[steel]] legs and six bladed arms extending from her back. The [[Tanakites]] believe that their sudden acquisition of power is a direct gift from her.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] is the [[Spider Goddess]] of Blood and War.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] is a goddess with an idol depicted as a black-bladed spider.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tanakites]] claim their sudden power is a gift from [[Mul’Tanak]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] likes blood and blades.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] is a goddess who descended in human form with a black carapace and scarlet-stained [[steel]] legs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The name [[Mul’Tanak]] is composed of the prefix 'Mul' for female deities and 'Tanak' meaning 'swords unending'.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] is a goddess.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] has six bladed arms on her back.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] has crimson eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mul’Tanak]] has black-armored hands.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Tanakites]]
